LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE HAS ANTHEM BLUE CROSS INSURANCE BUT THIS FACT WILL NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THERE WAS NO OBJECTION BY EITHER PARTY. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENT, DEFENDANT ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. COMPLAINT, 20 AND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY FEES ARE NOT IRRELEVANT, FALSE OR IMPROPER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C.
